headline: How Kroger’s New Shelf Registration and Workforce Push Could Shape Kroger (KR) Investors’ Outlook
summary: The Kroger Co. recently filed an omnibus shelf registration covering debt, preferred and common shares, depositary shares and warrants, while also launching its new Pearl Street Academy career development platform and supporting initiatives like Online Deal Days and expanded plant-based offerings with Beyond Meat across more than 2,000 stores. Together with a Platinum workforce rating and expanded associate education benefits exceeding US$64.00 million, these moves underline Kroger’s...
